landing.badge: Live on Solana Devnet · AI Fraud Detection
landing.title: Stop Real Estate Fraud Before Money Moves
landing.subtitle: TrustEstate blocks fraudulent deals automatically — using AI verification and on-chain escrow. Every property tokenized. Every transaction provable.
landing.step1_desc: A property becomes an NFT on Solana. Cadastral number, documents, and metadata are recorded on the blockchain.
landing.step2_desc: AI analyzes the property: checks for duplicates, price anomalies, seller history, and document authenticity.
landing.step3_desc: Funds are held in a smart contract (escrow). AI verifies the deal. Transfer happens only after both parties approve.
landing.step4_desc: Expensive properties can be split into shares. Investors buy fractions and receive proportional rental income.
landing.feat_ai_desc: Property verification via AlemLLM — Kazakhstan's AI. Detects 6 types of fraud.
landing.feat_sol_desc: Transactions in 0.4 seconds, fees ~$0.001. Everything is transparent and irreversible.
landing.feat_escrow_desc: Buyer's funds are protected in a smart contract until the deal is fully completed.
landing.feat_frac_desc: Invest in real estate from 1 SOL. Earn rental income proportional to your share.
landing.try_desc: Everything is live on Solana Devnet. Verify it now.

guide.title: User Guide
guide.subtitle: Step-by-step instructions for using TrustEstate
guide.step1_desc: Phantom is a Solana blockchain wallet. It replaces login and password.
guide.step1_sub2: Create a new wallet or import existing one
guide.step1_sub3: In settings, enable Testnet Mode → Solana Devnet
guide.step1_sub4: Save your seed phrase in a safe place
guide.step2_desc: Connecting wallet = signing in. No password, no registration.
guide.step2_sub1: Click 'Connect Wallet' in the top right corner
guide.step2_sub2: Select Phantom and confirm the connection
guide.step2_sub3: Fund your wallet at faucet.solana.com (free for Devnet)
guide.step3_desc: Turn real estate into an NFT on Solana blockchain.
guide.step3_sub2: Enter IIN and cadastral number for ownership verification
guide.step3_sub3: Fill in property details: address, area, rooms, price
guide.step3_sub4: AI will verify the property with 7 checks and record verdict on-chain
guide.step4_desc: AlemLLM analyzes each property for 6 types of fraud.
guide.step4_sub1: Open property card for detailed AI analysis
guide.step4_sub2: Green checks = safe, red checks = suspicious
guide.step4_sub3: If AI score is below 50 — purchase is automatically blocked
guide.step5_desc: Secure purchase through smart contract escrow.
guide.step5_sub1: Go to 'Deals' section and click 'Create Deal'
guide.step5_sub2: Select property and set price in SOL
guide.step5_sub3: Fund escrow — SOL is locked in the smart contract
guide.step5_sub4: Confirm deal — AI will verify and approve or block
guide.step6_desc: Every action is recorded on Solana. Full transparency.
guide.step6_sub1: Dashboard shows history of all transactions
guide.step6_sub2: Each transaction has a link to Solana Explorer
guide.step6_sub3: AI verdicts are recorded on-chain and cannot be changed
guide.faq1_a: On Devnet — yes. SOL is free via faucet.solana.com. On Mainnet the fee is 0.5% per deal.
guide.faq2_a: A unique token on the blockchain linked to a cadastral number. One property = one NFT. Double-selling is impossible.
guide.faq3_a: AlemLLM — Kazakhstan's national AI. Checks duplicates, price anomalies, seller history, documents, address and resale speed.
guide.faq4_q: What happens if AI blocks a deal?
guide.faq4_a: Funds from escrow are automatically returned to the buyer. The verdict is recorded on-chain and cannot be changed.

profile.warning_desc: AI detected fraud indicators for this seller. Transaction is not recommended.
